Work in context
AI agents are only as good as their context
Agents have the context they need before they act - ensuring work is being carried out confidently and accurately.
Agents have the context they need before they act - ensuring work is being carried out accurately.
Get Started
Full control
Agent activity
Track every agent action across your organization with a real-time log of what was done and when.
Permissions
Define exactly which data the agent can access, and whether it has permission to edit, create, or only read information.
Human in the loop
Validate your agents’ actions before activating it with simulation mode.
AI cost center
Track AI usage and spend per team and set limits and alerts.
Content ownership
You retain ownership of the content you provide, and the content generated by AI.
No data training
Your data is never used to train AI models — what happens in your workspace stays in your workspace.
Consider yourself limitless
An open platform for every agent your team works with
Connect to Claude, ChatGP

Integrations & apps
Connect the tools you already use to work smarter
Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work,
enhance collaboration, and drive better business results faster.
Get Started
Connectivity
Bring all your tools together
Integrate your favorite apps in seconds to create workflows for any need - bringing every team’s work into one place and keeping it perfectly aligned.
Get Started
Efficiency
Automate every workflow
Enable 2-way sync between monday products and any platform you work with to trigger automations, eliminate manual work, and keep your business in motion.
Get Started
Impact
Drive results with full visibility
Gain a real-time, cross-platform view that keeps data aligned and teams empowered — helping you make confident decisions and turn insight into measurable business impact.
Get Started
Integrations for every use case
Sales tracking
Customer support management
Code alignment
Team collaboration
Campaign optimization
Sales tracking
Close deals faster
Integrate Salesforce, Quickbooks, or HubSpot to manage leads, track opportunities, and keep your sales process proactive and results-driven.
Customer support management
Stay on top of every request
Connect Zendesk or Active Directory to manage your support tickets in monday.com, helping teams resolve issues faster and keep customers happy.
Code alignment
Keep development and delivery on track
Link pull requests from GitHub or GitLab directly to their related items in monday.com so teams can quickly access code and updates in context.
Team collaboration
Keep teams connected
Integrate your org’s communication tools - Slack, Gmail, Google Calendar, Outlook, Microsoft Teams, and more - to centralize communication and keep work flowing smoothly across channels.
Campaign optimization
Optimize campaign performance
Integrate Mailchimp, Intercom, or Google Ads to track campaign performance, refine strategies, and turn insights into growth.
“monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated.”
Naomi M.
Head of Client Success
“monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management across teams.”
Ray A.
Director of Customer Experience
“The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed and are completed within time.”
Jim M.
Real Estate Agent
Use your go-to AI assistants
Work with tools like Claude, Copilot, and ChatGPT through official integrations or the monday MCP, and keep data secure with trusted AI connectors.
Tailor your workflows with the monday marketplace
Enhance the monday.com experience with apps and integrations built by our trusted partners, helping you customize your workflow to your needs and add new functionality as you grow.
Explore the marketplace
Connect via no-code platforms
Easily connect monday.com to thousands of other tools with - no development needed.
Create a custom solution
Build your own integrations
Use our flexible APIs, SDKs to build custom apps and integrations tailored to your  unique needs.
Explore developer docs
Join as a marketplace partner
Turn your idea into monday app, reach 225,000+ customers, and grow your business on our marketplace.
Become a marketplace partner

hits.title: MondayDB: A new in-house data engine from monday.com
Ask HN: Does anyone use monday.com? Is it better than the others?
Why Monday.com decided to build its new database instead of buying one
Monday.com Shares Jump at IPO, Minting Cloud Software Billionaire in Israel

analysis.name: Monday.com
analysis.value_proposition: AI work platform where people and agents drive results together on one secure, flexible workspace across PMO, sales, marketing, IT, HR, and dev.
analysis.ideal_customer: Cross-functional teams at SMB through Fortune 500 companies needing a customizable work platform spanning projects, CRM, dev, service, and marketing — with AI agents embedded in workflows.

features.name: boards
features.description: Customizable boards for organizing projects, clients, and processes as items in rows.
features.evidence_quote: Boards are the place for organizing all your work and data (e.g. projects, clients, processes)

features.name: docs
features.description: Collaborative real-time docs that can embed live board data via Real Time Engine.
features.evidence_quote: Create docs and collaborate with your team in real time... turn those words into actions with live updated data

features.name: templates
features.description: 200+ pre-built templates across industries for team customization.
features.evidence_quote: Choose from over 200+ templates for every industry

features.name: column types
features.description: Configurable column types to build boards (8 in Free, more in paid).
features.evidence_quote: Build your board the way you want with a variety of column types.

features.name: ios and android apps
features.description: Mobile apps for iOS and Android to access boards on the go.
features.evidence_quote: Stay connected on-the-go and access monday.com from your smart phone.

features.name: ai agent workforce
features.description: Specialized AI agents that take on tasks and support multiple functions for automated execution at scale.
features.evidence_quote: Agents take on specialized tasks and support multiple functions for automated execution at scale

features.name: sidekick ai assistant
features.description: Context-aware AI assistant that understands, connects, and runs work.
features.evidence_quote: Sidekick is an intelligent context-aware AI assistant that understands, connects, and runs your work

features.name: vibe app builder
features.description: No-code builder to turn any business need into a custom business app in minutes.
features.evidence_quote: Turn any business need into a custom business app in minutes

features.name: ai meeting notetaker
features.description: Notetaker that keeps teams focused during meetings and turns conversations into actionable insights.
features.evidence_quote: Notetaker keeps your team focused during meetings and turns conversations into actionable insights

features.name: ai columns
features.description: AI-powered columns that run repetitive work directly within boards.
features.evidence_quote: AI columns run your repetitive work directly within your boards

features.name: ai workflow builder
features.description: Orchestrates workflows connecting agents and AI across every team.
features.evidence_quote: Orchestrate workflows that connect agents and AI and watch work get done across every team

features.name: ai credits
features.description: Monthly AI credits pool powering agents, Sidekick, Notetaker, AI columns, and Vibe.
features.evidence_quote: 1,000 AI credits / month ... Need more? Add credits anytime

features.name: unlimited free viewers
features.description: Read-only viewer seats included at no cost.
features.evidence_quote: Viewers have read-only access to your account data, with no editing rights.

features.name: unlimited items
features.description: No cap on items (rows) in boards.
features.evidence_quote: Items are the rows in monday.com boards... whatever you like.

features.name: automations
features.description: Automate repetitive tasks in boards via triggers/actions.
features.evidence_quote: Save precious time by automating repetitive tasks in your boards.

features.name: integrations
features.description: 850+ integrations connecting monday to tools like Slack, Salesforce, GitHub.
features.evidence_quote: Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work

features.name: timeline view
features.description: Visual timeline view for upcoming work.
features.evidence_quote: See all upcoming work in a visual timeline

features.name: gantt view
features.description: Gantt charts to track deadlines and dependencies.
features.evidence_quote: use Gantt charts to ensure you're meeting deadlines successfully

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Visual calendar view for managing upcoming work.
features.evidence_quote: Manage all your upcoming work using a visual calendar.

features.name: guest access
features.description: External users can access only specific boards they're invited to.
features.evidence_quote: Guests are external users who can only access boards you invite then to

features.name: api access
features.description: REST/GraphQL API for reading and updating monday data.
features.evidence_quote: Enable agents, integrations, and custom apps to read and update monday data

features.name: private boards and docs
features.description: Private boards and docs visible only to invited members.
features.evidence_quote: Private boards and docs are only visible to you and team members you invite.

features.name: advanced board views
features.description: Charts, graphs, and diagrams for visualizing board data.
features.evidence_quote: Visualize your data with different types of charts, graphs and diagrams.

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Track and monitor time spent on tasks.
features.evidence_quote: Track and monitor the time spent on each task.

features.name: advanced columns
features.description: Dynamic dependencies and complex automated calculations across board data.
features.evidence_quote: create dynamic dependencies between tasks and perform complex automated calculations

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Cross-board dashboards for reporting and analytics.
features.evidence_quote: Dashboards & reporting

features.name: forms
features.description: WorkForms for gathering requests, feedback, and data.
features.evidence_quote: Gather requests, feedback and data all in one place

features.name: kanban view
features.description: Kanban board view for workflow visualization.
features.evidence_quote: Features Dashboards Integrations Automations Gantt Kanban Docs Files

features.name: files
features.description: File attachments and storage on boards.
features.evidence_quote: Features ... Files

features.name: workdocs
features.description: Rich documents that can embed board views and live data.
features.evidence_quote: Docs

features.name: workcanvas
features.description: Digital whiteboard for visual collaboration and ideation.
features.evidence_quote: Create and innovate on a digital whiteboard

features.name: workforms
features.description: Form builder for collecting responses that feed into boards.
features.evidence_quote: WorkForms Get started Customization Settings Analytics

features.name: monday work management
features.description: Product for projects, tasks, and general work management.
features.evidence_quote: monday work management For projects & tasks

features.name: monday crm
features.description: CRM product for customer-facing teams (sales pipelines, deals).
features.evidence_quote: monday CRM For customer-facing teams

features.name: monday dev
features.description: Agile/sprint management product for product and dev teams.
features.evidence_quote: monday dev For product & dev teams

features.evidence_quote: monday service For IT & support

features.name: monday campaigns

features.evidence_quote: monday campaigns For email marketing teams

features.description: Tool for building custom AI agents for any workflow.
features.evidence_quote: AI agents Agent builder AI assistant

features.evidence_quote: monday MCP

features.evidence_quote: MondayDB: A new in-house data engine from monday.com

features.name: sprint management

features.evidence_quote: monday dev Get Started Sprint management

features.description: Portal for customers to submit and track service requests.
features.evidence_quote: monday service Get started Customer portal

features.evidence_quote: Managing tickets Connect channels

features.evidence_quote: monday CRM Get Started Lead management

features.name: dependencies
features.description: Task dependency tracking across Gantt/Timeline views.
features.evidence_quote: Gantt & dependencies Manage your portfolio

features.name: portfolio management

features.evidence_quote: Manage your portfolio

features.name: connect boards column

features.evidence_quote: Connect Boards Column

features.name: formula column
features.description: Column type for calculations across board fields.
features.evidence_quote: Formula Column

features.name: widgets
features.description: Dashboard widgets for reporting components.
features.evidence_quote: Board views Widgets

features.name: board views
features.description: Multiple view types for the same board data (table, kanban, timeline, etc.).
features.evidence_quote: Board views Widgets

features.name: roles and permissions
features.description: Granular access control via roles and permissions.
features.evidence_quote: Roles & permissions

features.description: Configurable authentication including SSO options.
features.evidence_quote: User authentication

features.description: Single sign-on for enterprise authentication.

features.evidence_quote: Board permissions

features.description: Workspace/folder hierarchy to organize boards.
features.evidence_quote: Hierarchy & organization

features.name: apps marketplace
features.description: Marketplace of third-party apps and monday-built extensions.
features.evidence_quote: Apps marketplace

features.name: developer sdk
features.description: APIs and SDKs for building custom apps and integrations.
features.evidence_quote: Use our flexible APIs, SDKs to build custom apps and integrations

features.name: no-code connectors
features.description: Connect monday.com to thousands of tools via no-code platforms.
features.evidence_quote: Easily connect monday.com to thousands of other tools with - no development needed.

features.name: 24/7 support
features.description: Around-the-clock customer support.
features.evidence_quote: 24/7 support

features.name: research agents
features.description: Pre-built agents for surfacing intelligence and insights.
features.evidence_quote: Research Agents Surface deep intelligence and actionable insights

features.name: reporting agents
features.description: Agents that automate status updates and performance reports.
features.evidence_quote: Reporting Agents Automate status updates and performance reports

features.name: insights agents
features.description: Agents that spot risks and progress gaps early.
features.evidence_quote: Insights Agents Spot risks and progress gaps before they become problems

features.name: process optimizer agents
features.description: Agents that identify and remove redundant or outdated data/processes.
features.evidence_quote: Process Optimizers Identify, fix, and remove redundant or outdated data

features.name: meeting assistants
features.description: Agents that schedule meetings, summarize calls, extract action items.
features.evidence_quote: Meeting Assistants Schedule meetings, summarize calls, and extract action items

features.name: ai template center
features.description: Library of prebuilt AI agent/solution templates.
features.evidence_quote: AI template center Solution templates

features.name: enterprise industry solutions
features.description: Vertical solutions for Retail, Media, Government.
features.evidence_quote: Industries Retail Media Government

features.name: ai trust center
features.description: Trust center documenting AI security and data handling.
features.evidence_quote: AI Trust Center

features.name: certifications program
features.description: Get certified program for monday users.
features.evidence_quote: Get certified

features.name: community forum
features.description: Peer community forum for learning and sharing.
features.evidence_quote: Community Learn with fellow monday.com enthusiasts

features.name: academy
features.description: Interactive courses and webinars for training.
features.evidence_quote: Academy Interactive courses and webinars

differentiators: AI agent workforce embedded in workflows ('You lead. Agents act.')
One platform spanning work management, CRM, dev, service, and marketing campaigns
MondayDB — proprietary in-house data engine built for platform scale
monday MCP — native MCP endpoint for Claude/ChatGPT/Copilot access
850+ integrations plus marketplace of 225,000+ customer-facing apps
Trusted by over 60% of the Fortune 500
Vibe app builder — turn business needs into custom apps in minutes

praised: 'monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated.' — Naomi M.
'monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management across teams.' — Ray A.
'The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed' — Jim M.
HN interest in in-house data engine MondayDB signals engineering credibility
complaints: HN 'Ask HN: Does anyone use monday.com? Is it better than the others?' — signals uncertainty vs. alternatives
'Show HN: tillywork - opensource work management (monday.com alternative)' — signals users seeking OSS alternatives
'Ask HN: Did Monday.com's SendGrid service get compromised?' — deliverability/security concern in community

free_tier.limits: Up to 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 Docs, 200+ templates, 8 column types

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 Docs, 200+ templates, 8 column types, mobile apps

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Basic AI (1,000 credits, 3 tools), unlimited free viewers, unlimited items

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: AI essentials (2,000 credits, 5 tools), 250 automations+integrations/mo, Timeline/Gantt/Calendar views, guest access, 1K API calls/day

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: Premium AI (3,000 credits, 6 tools), 25K automations+integrations/mo, private boards, advanced views/columns, time tracking, 10K API/day

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Enterprise AI, custom AI credits, custom security/scale — contact sales

pricing.notes: Seat-based; prices shown at 10-seat sample. Yearly billing saves ~18%. Additional AI credits purchasable. API call limits per day scale by tier. Monthly special offer discounts ($10–$30 off/mo) shown on pricing page. Viewers are unlimited/free starting Basic. Automations/integrations have per-month action caps that scale by tier.

recent_hn.title: We Shortened Development Feedback Loops from 30M to 30s
